last_successful_step: T003 steps 1.2, 4.1, and 4.2 finalized on 2026-03-11: the BRCA harmonized layer was reduced to two checkpoint tables only, the required publication-facing header was enforced as the schema floor, extras were marked distinctly in the UI/XLSX export, obsolete per-source harmonized outputs were removed from arab_acmg_harmonized, and Cloud Run revision supervisor-ui-00010-qql served the live metadata and sample endpoints successfully.
